zh.lifeSummary: 當Hannah Timberlake於1656年6月27日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托蕾托 康普頓時，她的父親John Timberlake37歲，母親Mary35歲。她於1675年10月3日與Lieutnant John Woodman在美國羅得島紐波特蕾托 康普頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1713年5月13日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德紐波特波斯姆斯享年56歲，埋葬在美國羅得島紐波特蕾托 康普頓武德曼 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hannah Timberlake于1656年6月27日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼布里斯托蕾托 康普頓时，她的父亲John Timberlake37岁，母亲Mary35岁。她于1675年10月3日与Lieutnant John Woodman在美国罗德岛州紐波特蕾托 康普頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1713年5月13日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德紐波特波斯姆斯享年56岁，埋葬在美国罗德岛州紐波特蕾托 康普頓武德曼 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Timberlake
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a lost place in the parish ofBayton, Worcestershire, so named from Old English timber‘timber, wood’ + lacu ‘stream’.

nameMeanings.name: Hannah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the mother of the prophet Samuel (1 Samuel 1:2), Hebrew Hanna. It is derived from a Hebrew word meaning ‘He (i.e. God) has favoured me (i.e. with a child)’. See also Anne . This form of the name was taken up as a given name by the Puritans in the 16th and 17th centuries and remained popular until the late 19th century. Thereafter it fell somewhat from favour but has enjoyed a massive revival since the 1990s.

variants.name: Hanna
meanings: Either the biblical name ( see Hannah ) or a short form of Johanna .

variants.name: Hana
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

historicEvents.description: The Colony of Rhode Island and Providence Plantations, as it was from June 22, 1703, when it created the counties of Providence Plantations and Rhode Island, to June 16, 1729, when Providence Plantations County was renamed Providence, Rhode Island County was renamed Newport, and Kings County was created from Providence.
Oldest grave seen in the memorial list

en.lifeSummary: When Hannah Timberlake was born on 27 June 1656, in Little Compton, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, John Timberlake, was 37 and her mother, Mary, was 35. She married Lieutnant John Woodman on 3 October 1675, in Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, United States. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 13 May 1713, in Portsmouth, Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America, at the age of 56, and was buried in Woodman Cemetery, Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hannah Timberlake est née le 27 juin 1656, à Little Compton, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, John Timberlake, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Mary, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Lieutnant John Woodman le 3 octobre 1675, à Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 13 mai 1713, à Portsmouth, Newport, Rhode Island, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterrée à Woodman Cemetery, Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hannah Timberlake am 27. Juni 1656 in Little Compton, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Timberlake 37 und ihre Mutter Mary 35. Sie hat am 3. Oktober 1675 in Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, Vereinigte Staaten Lieutnant John Woodman geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 13. Mai 1713 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Portsmouth, Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America und wurde in Woodman Cemetery, Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hannah Timberlake è nata il il 27 giugno 1656 nel Little Compton, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, John Timberlake, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Mary, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Lieutnant John Woodman il 3 ottobre 1675, nel Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 13 maggio 1713, nel Portsmouth, Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolta a Woodman Cemetery, Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.Little Compton, Bristol, Massachusetts B: イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーブリストルリットル コンプトン

ja.Little Compton, Bristol, Massachusetts B: イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーブリストルリットル コンプトン
ja.Portsmouth, Rhode Island, British Coloni: イギリス植民地アメリカロード イスランドポルトスモウス
ja.lifeSummary: Hannah Timberlakeが1656年6月27日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーブリストルリットル コンプトンで生まれた時，父John Timberlakeは37歳，母Maryは35歳であった。1675年10月3日にアメリカ合衆国ロードアイランド州ニュープオルトリットル コンプトンでLieutnant John Woodmanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1713年5月13日にイギリス植民地アメリカロード イスランドニュープオルトポルトスモウスで56歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ロードアイランド州ニュープオルトリットル コンプトンウッドマン セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Little Compton, Bristol, Massachusetts B: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 브리스톨 리틀 콤프턴
ko.Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, B: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 뉴포트 리틀 콤프턴

ko.Little Compton, Bristol, Massachusetts B: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 브리스톨 리틀 콤프턴
ko.Portsmouth, Rhode Island, British Coloni: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 포츠모우스
ko.lifeSummary: Hannah Timberlake(이)가 1656년 6월 27일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 브리스톨 리틀 콤프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Timberlake(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1675년 10월 3일 미국 로드아일랜드 주 뉴포트 리틀 콤프턴에서 Lieutnant John Woodman(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1713년 5월 13일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 뉴포트 포츠모우스에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 로드아일랜드 주 뉴포트 리틀 콤프턴 우드먼 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hannah Timberlake nasceu em 27 de junho de 1656, em Little Compton, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, John Timberlake, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Mary, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Lieutnant John Woodman em 3 de outubro de 1675, em Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 13 de maio de 1713, em Portsmouth, Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America, com 56 anos, e foi sepultada em Woodman Cemetery, Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hannah Timberlake родилась 27 июня 1656 г. в местности литл комптон, бристол, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени John Timberlake было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lieutnant John Woodman 3 октября 1675 г. в местности литл комптон, нюпорт, Род-Айленд, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 13 мая 1713 г. в местности порцмоут, нюпорт, род исланд, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 56 лет и была похоронена в местности вудмен кеметири, литл комптон, нюпорт, Род-Айленд, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hannah Timberlake nació el 27 de junio de 1656, en Little Compton, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, John Timberlake, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Mary, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Lieutnant John Woodman el 3 de octubre de 1675, en Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 13 de mayo de 1713, en Portsmouth, Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultada en Woodman Cemetery, Little Compton, Newport, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos.
